summary: Verified all 7 reported UI fixes: Mobile Add Board modal scrolls properly with Cancel button visible, Dialog component has proper max-height for mobile safe areas, PostModal shows Instagram-style fullscreen view on mobile with author info at top and action buttons at bottom, truncated caption with 'more' option, JumpInSessionModal has responsive styles (drawer on mobile, centered modal on desktop), and handlePostDeleted properly removes posts from feed without ghost placeholders.

minor.issue: Returns AxiosError on feed load - non-blocking console error

critical_code_review_comments: dialog.jsx: max-h-[calc(100dvh-160px)] on mobile properly accounts for nav bars (80px bottom + top safe area)
SurfboardsTab.js: Modal uses flex column with fixed header/footer and scrollable content area - Cancel button at y=725 is within 844px viewport
PostModal.js: isMobile state detection (window.innerWidth < 768) correctly switches between Instagram fullscreen and desktop side-by-side layouts
PostModal.js mobile view: Has top gradient with close button + author info, bottom gradient with action buttons + caption + timestamp
JumpInSessionModal.js: Responsive classes correctly set - 'inset-x-0 bottom-0' for mobile drawer, 'sm:top-1/2 sm:left-1/2 sm:-translate-x-1/2 sm:-translate-y-1/2' for desktop centered modal
Feed.js handlePostDeleted: Properly filters deleted post AND clears postModalOpen/postMenuOpen state to prevent ghost placeholders
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 7 reported UI issues have been verified as fixed. Mobile dialog/modal scroll issues resolved with proper max-height and safe area handling. Instagram-style post modal working on mobile with all expected elements (author info, action buttons, caption with 'more', timestamp). Desktop shows side-by-side layout. JumpInSessionModal responsive styles verified in code. Post deletion properly clears state.

mobile_add_board_modal_scroll.details: Cancel button visible at y=725 (within 844px viewport), modal max-height=684px fits properly

mobile_dialog_safe_areas.details: Dialog component has max-h-[calc(100dvh-160px)] on mobile to account for nav bars

mobile_post_modal_instagram_style.details: data-testid='post-modal-mobile' detected, fullscreen black background with gradient overlays

mobile_post_modal_author_info.details: Top gradient has close button (X), author avatar, name (David Pritzker), location (Sebastian Inlet)

mobile_post_modal_action_buttons.details: Bottom gradient has heart, comment, share, bookmark buttons

mobile_post_modal_caption.details: Caption shows author name + text, 'View all X comments' link, timestamp (1D AGO)

desktop_jump_in_modal_style.details: JumpInSessionModal.js has responsive classes: mobile drawer (inset-x-0 bottom-0), desktop centered (sm:top-1/2 sm:left-1/2 sm:-translate-x-1/2 sm:-translate-y-1/2)

post_deletion_no_ghost.details: handlePostDeleted filters post from array AND clears postModalOpen/postMenuOpen if deleted post was open

desktop_post_modal_layout.details: Desktop shows side-by-side layout: image on left, details/comments on right (not Instagram fullscreen)
